name: HRT_TASKS
description: This table is for storing the tasks and is part of HCM Tasks Functionality.

columns.Name: TASK_ID
columns.Comments: The Column represents the identification of a assigned task and is PrimaryKey as well.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: ENTERPRISE ID for SAAS compliance

columns.Name: BPEL_TASK_ID
columns.Comments: BPEL_TASK_ID Capturing task id generated by BPEL in the call back

columns.Name: TASK_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: TASK_TYPE_CODE  to classify the task like FYI task..etc

columns.Name: PRIORITY
columns.Comments: The column represents the priority of the task.

columns.Name: PERCENT_COMPLETE
columns.Comments: PERCENT_COMPLETE is to know the percent complete of a task

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: STATUS_CODE is for Status of atask like Assigned, Completed..etc

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Column: Start Date of a Task Assigned

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Column: End Date of a Task Assigned

columns.Name: DUE_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Column: Due Date of a Task Assigned

columns.Name: SUBJECT
columns.Comments: The column represents the subject of the assigned task.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: The column represents the description of the assigned task.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
